# The AI Resource Hub

> Independent AI model comparison for pricing, benchmarks, tools, and live news.

This site is a reference resource for comparing AI models across pricing, quality, speed, and benchmarks. It covers LLMs, image models, video models, speech models, and creative AI tools.

## Key pages

- [Model Comparison](/ai-resource-hub/compare/llm/): Compare 139+ AI models by pricing, quality, speed, and context window
- [Benchmarks](/ai-resource-hub/benchmarks/): MMLU, GPQA, MATH-500, HumanEval, SWE-bench, Arena ELO scores
- [Leaderboard](/ai-resource-hub/leaderboard/): Models ranked by quality score
- [News](/ai-resource-hub/news/): Daily AI news from 74 curated sources
- [Pricing Trends](/ai-resource-hub/pricing-trends/): How model costs are changing over time
- [Labs & Providers](/ai-resource-hub/labs/): 34 AI providers with context and history
- [Tools](/ai-resource-hub/tools/): Calculator, token counter, and tool guides
- [Guides](/ai-resource-hub/guides/): Plain-English learning paths and AI glossary

## Data

- Model comparison data (CSV): /ai-resource-hub/data/ai-models-comparison.csv
- Model comparison data (JSON): /ai-resource-hub/data/ai-models-comparison.json
- RSS feed: /ai-resource-hub/rss.xml

## About

Built and maintained by Kol Tregaskes. Updated daily via automated scrapers.
Data sourced from OpenRouter, Artificial Analysis, LM Arena, and official provider pages.
Independent and unaffiliated. UK-based.

## Contact

- Website: https://koltregaskes.com
- X/Twitter: https://x.com/koltregaskes
